top_signals.title: Trump lashes out at Republicans who oppose his ‘anti-weaponisation’ fund
top_signals.summary: President says senators who object to his $1.8bn fund for alleged victims of ‘lawfare’ are ‘screwing the Republican Party’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Atomic Monster President on Business of Horror Films
top_signals.summary: Atomic Monster President Michael Clear discusses the business of horror films and how they keep people going to theaters. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
